title: 目標達成の後に・拍動、強く

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap continues to do well in her races. It's
obvious to any onlooker that she's a skilled
runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eyes firmly set on the Arima Kinen, she begins
training once again.
